entities.name: MEGHDOOT
entities.description: A mobile application designed to deliver weather information and crop-specific advisories to farmers in India

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL ADVISORIES
entities.description: Timely weather-based guidance provided to farmers to enhance decision-making and reduce production risk

entities.name: PRODUCTION RISK
entities.description: The risk of crop loss or reduced yield due to challenging weather conditions

entities.name: WEATHER CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental weather factors that can impact agricultural production

entities.name: CLIMATE INFORMATION SERVICES
entities.description: Services that provide relevant climate data and information to users

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the Meghdoot app is deployed and the services are provided

entities.name: INDIA METEOROLOGICAL DEPARTMENT
entities.description: A government agency involved in the development of Meghdoot and the generation of weather data

entities.name: INDIAN INSTITUTION FOR TROPICAL METEOROLOGY
entities.description: A research institution involved in the development of Meghdoot and the generation of weather data

entities.name: INDIAN COUNCIL FOR AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH
entities.description: An organization involved in the joint initiative to develop the Meghdoot app

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL CROPS RESEARCH INSTITUTE FOR THE SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: An international research organization involved in the joint initiative to develop the Meghdoot app

entities.name: DISTRICT AGROMETEOROLOGICAL ADVISORY SERVICE
entities.description: A service by IMD that issues crop-specific weather-based agro-advisories for all districts in India

entities.name: WEATHER RECORDINGS
entities.description: Observed weather data made available through the Meghdoot app

entities.name: FORECASTS
entities.description: Predicted weather information generated by IMD and IITM and delivered via Meghdoot

entities.name: WARNINGS
entities.description: Weather-related alerts generated by IMD and IITM and delivered via Meghdoot

relationships.target: INTERNATIONAL CROPS RESEARCH INSTITUTE FOR THE SEMI-ARID TROPICS
